entities.name: Jacob Bank
entities.context: Presenter discussing AI-driven organizational transformation; runs marketing with 40-60 AI agents

entities.name: AI Agents
entities.context: Software agents used to handle work traditionally done by humans; Jacob uses 40-60 for marketing

entities.name: Super IC Generalists
entities.context: Vision of future individual contributors who manage dozens of AI agents each

entities.name: Knowledge Work Transformation
entities.context: Core thesis that companies with heavy knowledge work will change dramatically due to current AI capabilities

entities.name: Small Teams + AI Agents Model
entities.context: Organizational framework where small teams of generalists manage many AI agents; Jacob's North Star vision

entities.name: Viral LinkedIn Post
entities.context: Post by Jacob Bank about '40 AI agents' that received 33,000 comments approximately 4 months prior to presentation

relationships.context: His marketing team is 'just me and 40 AI agents' (now 60)
His vision of what typical company structure will look like in the future
Core claim that companies will change dramatically even if AI doesn't improve from current state
Authored the post as proof of concept for his organizational model
Each generalist manages dozens of AI agents
The model represents how organizational transformation will manifest
